decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id route_m16-mentioned, which is the correct registry record for the M16 station locations diagram on page 20 of the 20110118 34th St CAC3 slides. No different registry record is a closer match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the M16 subway line route in New York City, highlighting Uptown and Downtown stop locations. The route is shown as a green line with circular markers at each station.
